test.display_value: Scheduled script send email notification past End Date copy

source="x_1883746_loaner_0">8fa891c8836332105587fa96feaad3c5</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Loaner Device Manager">8fa891c8836332105587fa96feaad3c5</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_atf_step_c880410e83204f105587fa96feaad3f6</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 19:33:20</sys_updated_on><table/><test display_value="Scheduled script send email notification past End Date copy">8480410e83204f105587fa96feaad3b5</test><timeout/><warning_message/></sys_atf_step><sys_variable_value action="delete_multiple" query="document_key=c880410e83204f105587fa96feaad3f6"/><sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><document>sys_atf_step</document><document_key>c880410e83204f105587fa96feaad3f6</document_key><order>100</order><sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-30 19:33:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>0c80410e83204f105587fa96feaad3f7</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 19:33:20</sys_updated_on><value>3.1</value><variable display_value="Jasmine version">42f2564b73031300440211d8faf6a777</variable></sys_variable_value><sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><document>sys_atf_step</document><document_key>c880410e83204f105587fa96feaad3f6</document_key><order>200</order><sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-30 19:33:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>4080410e83204f105587fa96feaad3f8</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 19:33:20</sys_updated_on><value>(function(outputs, steps, params, stepResult, assertEqual) {
    // 1. Query for your specific scheduled job
    var scheduledJob = new GlideRecord('sysauto_script');
    
    // Make sure the name matches your scheduled job exactly!
    if (scheduledJob.get('name', 'Check Overdue Loaner Devices')) {
        
        // 2. Use GlideScopedEvaluator to run the script synchronously
        var evaluator = new GlideScopedEvaluator();
        evaluator.evaluateScript(scheduledJob, 'script');
        
        stepResult.setOutputMessage('Successfully evaluated the scheduled job script.');
        return true; // Pass the step
        
    } else {
        stepResult.setOutputMessage('Failed to find the scheduled job.');
        return false; // Fail the step if the job name is misspelled
    }

})(outputs, steps, params, stepResult, assertEqual);
</value><variable display_value="Test script">989d9e235324220002c6435723dc3484</variable></sys_variable_value></record_update>
